sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['pixels'] >= 10 and node['color'] not in ('B', 'g', 'S'):
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, center=({(min(rows)+max(rows))//2},{(min(cols)+max(cols))//2})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
